query: I'm looking for reports where pilots inputted the wrong waypoint into the FMS because the assigned fix had a nearly identical phonetic name or spelling to another fix.

Need to find cases where ramp agents or ground personnel pushed back on a supervisor's orders to clean up a dangerous goods/hazmat spill, specifically because they didn't have the right PPE or training.
Show me incidents where passengers brought large lithium-ion batteries or spare power banks in their checked luggage or gate-checked bags without telling anyone, violating dangerous goods policies.
Find reports where maintenance mechanics forgot to close the ground valve all the way, causing the plane to fail to pressurize as it climbed out.
Looking for landing gear tire blowouts or failures that happened during the landing rollout and caused the plane to veer into the grass or damage the wing.

I need UAS incident reports where a drone pilot flew inside an active Temporary Flight Restriction (TFR) established for a wildfire or emergency because they didn't get an SGI waiver or misunderstood their app.
Pull up airline crew reports of near mid-air collisions (NMAC) with drones specifically while the aircraft was established on an ILS glidepath or final approach.
Are there any reports where a flight attendant missed the 'prepare for takeoff' call and wasn't in their jumpseat because they were arguing with a passenger about wearing a COVID mask?

Look for situations where a crew did an engine run at the gate to troubleshoot an active fuel leak, and then accidentally pushed back and departed before getting the official maintenance release paperwork.
Find helicopter incident reports where the pilot had to aggressively maneuver or perform an auto-rotation because ATC cleared another plane onto their runway while they were hovering or practicing.
Show me the report where a pilot had a total electrical failure at night and had to use a handheld light and their personal cell phone to call the tower after landing.
I'm trying to track down ramp congestion issues where multiple aircraft were pushed back by tugs into the same alleyway at the exact same time, blocking each other or almost hitting tails.
Need ATC reports complaining about military fighter jets or tactical flights that spilled out of their ATCAA or MOA airspace without a radar handoff, descending right into civilian traffic.
Pull incidents where a preceding aircraft's wake turbulence caused an uncommanded roll or triggered the stick shaker on the trailing aircraft right at takeoff rotation or on short final.
Find cases where a bird strike occurred right at liftoff or rotation, causing engine vibrations and prompting the crew to leave the landing gear down and return to the airport immediately.
Show me reports of GPWS 'Pull Up' or terrain alerts going off because ATC gave a low vector over mountainous terrain or the crew was descending too fast during a night visual approach.
Looking for hot air balloon incidents where sudden wind shear or a wind shift on short final caused the balloon envelope to hit a tree, a crane, or a house roof.
Find runway incursion or taxi deviation reports that specifically blame faded paint, poor signage, or confusing taxiway concrete markings making it hard to see where to turn or hold short.
I need safety reports about ground support vehicles, like motorized baggage carts or tugs, blowing through stop signs or zipper roads and forcing a taxiing aircraft to slam on the brakes.
Pull the report where the First Officer fainted, looked pale, or became medically incapacitated in the flight deck or forward galley while the plane was at cruise altitude.

Looking for drone pilots who violated airspace because they relied on a third-party app like Airmap or Aloft and either forgot to submit the LAANC request or didn't realize they were inside Class C/D boundaries.
Are there any ATC facility reports of computer keyboards or radar equipment breaking because they were sprayed with too much liquid during mandatory COVID-19 deep cleanings?
Find the crazy report where a flight instructor literally had to use physical force and strike their student to get them to let go of the yoke during a botched takeoff.
Show me flight crew reports where using FLCH or VNAV modes to comply with an ATC speed restriction caused them to climb or descend right through a coded crossing altitude on a SID or STAR.
Need cabin crew reports involving biohazards, specifically passengers throwing up in the lavatory because they drank too much alcohol before boarding.
